positive: Stylized minimalist celestial map featuring geometric constellations and glowing cosmic dust, arranged around a central, abstract crescent moon. The color palette is deep indigo, sapphire blue, and luminous gold accents, suggesting starlight and depth. Use clean, thick outlines and negative space to define the star groupings. Composition must be perfectly symmetrical and centered, ideal for a t-shirt print. The style should evoke Art Deco and contemporary scientific illustration, with a flat design aesthetic but deep, cosmic luminosity. Highly detailed, high contrast, vector quality, clean silhouettes, studio lighting, apparel print art.
negative: blurry, low detail, text, watermark, logo, signature, gradient noise, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, disfigured, writing, cartoon, photorealistic, oil painting
